podcast_description: Short daily English stories for Aron.

recurring_characters.name: Leo
recurring_characters.description: curious, cheerful, and sometimes a little careless

recurring_characters.name: Ben
recurring_characters.description: fond of small inventions and unexpected ideas

recurring_characters.name: Ms Green
recurring_characters.description: a warm teacher with a dry sense of humour

story_themes.guidance: A light school comedy about a small misunderstanding, a classroom surprise, homework, class duty, or a friendly competition.
A warm and funny family moment involving plans, chores, a meal, a visitor, or a harmless mistake.
A safe small adventure in an everyday setting, with curiosity, a minor problem, and a satisfying ending.
A playful science or invention story grounded in ordinary school life.
A short travel or local discovery story with an amusing but believable event.
